about.title: About
about.name: Robin Adamek
about.bioLead: Vienna based photographer and filmmaker specializing in sports, events, festivals and commercial content.
about.bio1: My approach to photography and filmmaking is centered around capturing the raw energy and authentic emotion of the moment. Whether it's the peak action in a sports competition, the atmosphere of a music festival, or the intimate moments of a wedding, my goal is to deliver cinematic and premium visuals that tell a compelling story.
about.bio2: With years of experience shooting dynamic environments, I thrive in fast-paced situations where anticipating the next moment is key. I work closely with brands, agencies, and individuals to create high-impact visual content.

contact.title: Hello.
contact.subtitle:
Available for bookings worldwide.
Let's create something extraordinary.

3x3-austria-tour.title: 3x3 Austria Tour — Stockerau 2025
3x3-austria-tour.description: Complete coverage of the 3x3 Austria Tour finals in Stockerau. Fast-paced action shots and emotional player portraits.

void-festival.title: VOID Festival 2025
void-festival.description: Immersive visual coverage of the VOID Festival. Capturing the energy, light shows, and the massive crowd.

blumenball.title: Blumenball Tulln 2026
blumenball.description: Elegant event photography capturing the prestigious Blumenball in Tulln. A mix of portrait and atmosphere shots.

z-fitness.title: Z Fitness
z-fitness.description: Commercial and sports photography for Z Fitness. Dynamic training shots and vibrant brand visuals.

skischule-exklusiv.title: Skischule Exklusiv
skischule-exklusiv.description: High-altitude commercial photography for Skischule Exklusiv. Capturing the thrill of alpine skiing and mountain landscapes.

sitzenberg-ball.title: Sitzenberg Ball 2025
sitzenberg-ball.description: Elegant event photography from the Sitzenberg Ball. Portraits, atmosphere and the magic of a grand evening.

hochzeit-erwin-resi.title: Hochzeit Erwin und Resi
hochzeit-erwin-resi.description: Beautiful wedding photography capturing the special moments of Erwin and Resi. A cinematic and emotional documentation of their big day.

sections.title: EU Dispute Resolution:
content: Consumers have the opportunity to submit complaints to the EU's online dispute resolution platform: http://ec.europa.eu/odr.
You can also address any complaints to the email address provided above.

sections.title: Liability for contents of this website:
content: We are constantly developing the contents of this website and strive to provide correct and up-to-date information. Unfortunately, we cannot assume liability for the correctness of all content on this website, especially for those provided by third parties. If you notice any problematic or illegal content, please contact us immediately.

sections.title: Copyright Notice:
content: All contents of this website (pictures, photos, texts, videos) are subject to copyright. If necessary, we will legally pursue the unauthorized use of parts of the contents of our site.

sections.title: 1. Privacy at a glance
content: We are very pleased with your interest in our company. Data protection is of a particularly high priority for us. We process your data exclusively on the basis of the legal provisions (GDPR, TKG 2003).

sections.title: 2. Contacting us
content: If you contact us via the form on the website or by e-mail, your data will be stored by us for six months for the purpose of processing the inquiry and in case of follow-up questions. We do not pass on this data without your consent.

sections.title: 3. Server-Log-Files
content: The provider of the pages (GitHub Pages / your host) automatically collects and stores information in so-called server log files, which your browser automatically transmits. These are: Browser type and version, operating system used, referrer URL, hostname of the accessing computer, time of the server request, IP address.

sections.title: 4. External Services (Hosting via GitHub Pages)
content: This website is hosted on GitHub Pages (GitHub Inc.). When you visit our website, GitHub records connection data (e.g. your IP address) in order to make the website available and to guarantee IT security. We have no direct influence on this. Further details can be found in GitHub's privacy policy.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
content: You generally have the rights to information, correction, deletion, restriction, data portability, revocation and objection. If you believe that the processing of your data violates data protection law or your data protection claims have otherwise been violated in some way, you can complain to the supervisory authority. In Austria, this is the Data Protection Authority.

sections.title: 1. Scope
content: These General Terms and Conditions apply to all legal relationships between the photographer Robin Adamek (hereinafter referred to as "Contractor") and his contractual partners (hereinafter referred to as "Client"). The version valid at the time of the conclusion of the contract is authoritative.

sections.title: 2. Copyright and Usage Rights
content: a) The Contractor is entitled to the copyright of all works created by him (photographs, films) in accordance with the Austrian Copyright Act.
b) The Client only acquires a simple usage right to the works for the agreed purpose. Any further use requires the written consent of the Contractor.
c) The Contractor has the right to use the created works free of charge for self-promotion (e.g. website, social media, portfolio), unless expressly agreed otherwise in writing.

sections.title: 3. Remuneration and Due Date
content: a) The agreed fee will be charged for the production of the works. Additional services (e.g. additional effort, travel expenses) will be invoiced separately.
b) Invoices are due without deduction within 14 days of the invoice date.

sections.title: 4. Liability
content: The Contractor is only liable for intent and gross negligence. No liability is accepted for damages caused by force majeure, technical failures or data loss (except in cases of full intent).

sections.title: 5. Cancellation
content: If the Client cancels the booking before the agreed date, the Contractor is entitled to charge a cancellation fee of 50% of the agreed total amount if the cancellation is not made at least 14 days in advance.

sections.title: 6. Final Provisions
content: a) Place of performance and place of jurisdiction is Vienna, Austria.
b) Austrian law applies.
c) Should a provision of these GTC be invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions shall not be affected.
